user_story: As an employee, I want to add a new feedback or grievance, so that I can raise concerns to HR
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Feedback / Grievance screen; When I click Add new Feedback / Grievance and submit; Then a new feedback item is created

user_story: As an employee, I want to filter my feedback by status such as Submitted, Feedback received, Closed or Reopened, so that I can track its progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Feedback / Grievance screen; When I select a Status and search; Then only items in that status are listed

user_story: As an employee, I want to view my feedback list with Type, Title, Sent to, Status and Task columns, so that I can review all my submissions at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I have feedback items; When the list loads; Then each row shows Type, Title, Sent to, Status and Task

user_story: As an employee, I want to refresh the feedback list, so that I can see the latest status updates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Feedback / Grievance screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an employee, I want to reset my search filters, so that I can view all my feedback again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a status filter; When I click Reset; Then the filter returns to All
